# preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts { #spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts }

`preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts`

Linear interpolation transformer for time series data.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [LinearlyInterpolateTS](#spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS) | Transformer that applies linear interpolation to time series data. |

### LinearlyInterpolateTS { #spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS }

```python
preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS()
```

Transformer that applies linear interpolation to time series data.

This transformer fills missing values using linear interpolation and
forward-fills any remaining gaps (e.g., at the end of the series).

#### Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> import pandas as pd
>>> import numpy as np
>>> from spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts import LinearlyInterpolateTS
>>> s = pd.Series([1.0, np.nan, 3.0, np.nan])
>>> interpolator = LinearlyInterpolateTS()
>>> s_filled = interpolator.fit_transform(s)
>>> s_filled.tolist()
[1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 3.0]
```

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [apply](#spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.apply) | Apply linear interpolation and forward-fill. |
| [fit](#spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.fit) | Fitted transformer (no-op). |
| [transform](#spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.transform) | Transform the input data by applying linear interpolation. |

##### apply { #spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.apply }

```python
preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.apply(y)
```

Apply linear interpolation and forward-fill.

###### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                                | Description                | Default    |
|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------|------------|
| y      | [Union](`typing.Union`)\[[pd](`pandas`).[Series](`pandas.Series`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`)\] | Input Series or DataFrame. | _required_ |

###### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                                | Description                                                    |
|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | [Union](`typing.Union`)\[[pd](`pandas`).[Series](`pandas.Series`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`)\] | Union[pd.Series, pd.DataFrame]: Interpolated and ffilled data. |

##### fit { #spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.fit }

```python
preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.fit(X, y=None)
```

Fitted transformer (no-op).

###### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                | Description   | Default    |
|--------|---------------------|---------------|------------|
| X      | [Any](`typing.Any`) | Input data.   | _required_ |
| y      | [Any](`typing.Any`) | Ignored.      | `None`     |

###### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                      | Description             |
|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------|
| self   | [LinearlyInterpolateTS](`spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS`) | The fitted transformer. |

##### transform { #spotforecast2_safe.preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.transform }

```python
preprocessing.linearly_interpolate_ts.LinearlyInterpolateTS.transform(X)
```

Transform the input data by applying linear interpolation.

###### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                                | Description                               | Default    |
|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|------------|
| X      | [Union](`typing.Union`)\[[pd](`pandas`).[Series](`pandas.Series`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`)\] | Input Series or DataFrame to interpolate. | _required_ |

###### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                                                                                | Description                                        |
|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------|
|        | [Union](`typing.Union`)\[[pd](`pandas`).[Series](`pandas.Series`), [pd](`pandas`).[DataFrame](`pandas.DataFrame`)\] | Union[pd.Series, pd.DataFrame]: Interpolated data. |
